{"code":"import pandas as pd
import json

var_tool_query_db_MSofADbqZhBlWM6aRJpB = json.loads(var_tool_query_db_MSofADbqZhBlWM6aRJpB)
df = pd.DataFrame(var_tool_query_db_MSofADbqZhBlWM6aRJpB["result"])

df["Date"] = pd.to_datetime(df["Date"], errors="coerce")
df = df.dropna(subset=["Date"])
df["Year"] = df["Date"].dt.year
df = df[df["Year"] >= 2020]

def calculate_intraday_volatility(df):
    df["IntradayVolatility"] = (df["High"].astype(float) - df["Low"].astype(float)) / df["Open"].astype(float)
    return df

df = calculate_intraday_volatility(df)

asian_indices = ["HSI", "N225", "000001.SS", "399001.SZ", "NSEI", "TWII"]
df_asian = df[df["Index"].isin(asian_indices)]

avg_volatility = df_asian.groupby("Index")["IntradayVolatility"].mean()

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(avg_volatility.to_dict()))"}

import pandas as pd
import json

var_tool_query_db_yyTPH34XqSxMdQ1nTx4q = json.loads(var_tool_query_db_yyTPH34XqSxMdQ1nTx4q)
df = pd.DataFrame(var_tool_query_db_yyTPH34XqSxMdQ1nTx4q["result"])

df["Date"] = pd.to_datetime(df["Date"], errors="coerce")
df = df.dropna(subset=["Date"])
df["Year"] = df["Date"].dt.year
df = df[df["Year"] >= 2020]

def calculate_intraday_volatility(df):
    df["IntradayVolatility"] = (df["High"].astype(float) - df["Low"].astype(float)) / df["Open"].astype(float)
    return df
